About Me

郭正浩

I graduated from Guangdong University of Technology and I am a programmer specializing in real-time interaction and immersive experience development.

Background

I have a solid foundation in C++/C# programming and am familiar with the dual-engine workflow of Unreal Engine and Unity. I have in-depth project experience in the Gameplay framework and network synchronization.
